title: Ubiquiti Swiss Army Knife Ultra
description: An incredibly compact Access point from the UniFi family for indoor and, thanks to IPx6 protection, outdoor use, this is the new Ubiquiti Swiss Army Knife Ultra. The UK-Ultra is equipped with 1x Gbit Ethernet, which in addition to data transmission is also used for PoE power supply with 44-57V. It supports 8021.11a/b/g/n/ac wireless standards in a 2x2 MIMO configuration for both frequency bands and can handle 200+ connected clients. With a pair of RSMA connectors, it is possible to connect an… The access point offers a wide range of wall, ceiling or mast mounting options, with mounting accessories included. The unit requires the UniFi Network application version 7.5.187 or later To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, which allows you to manage the entire network. The undeniable advantage of UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters and advanced features such as SSID, guest account, homepage, traffic statistics as well as the list and status of associated clients quickly and… Fast Roaming - failover between APs Wireless uplink (handy where a data cable can't reach) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balance - maintain a steady load / switch clients Rate limiting for each SSID Equipment Wall, ceiling and pipe brackets Drilling template Tensioning tape Mounting kit GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 23 Security WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2, TKIP/AES) 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Internal antennas 1 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 6, 4,7 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) RSMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 44 .. 57V DC Max. power consumption [W] 8 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Weight [g] 173 Width [mm] 84 Height [mm] 137 Depth [mm] 34
